languages.text: "Кто дал тебе право приказывать меровскому 32-му, не уведомляя меня?"
"Who granted you the authority to command the 32nd Merov Regiment without informing me?"
languages.original_text: "Кто дал тебе право приказывать меровскому 32-му, не уведомляя меня?"

traits.locale_text: "Who granted you the authority to command the 32nd Merov without informing me?"
"Who granted you the authority to command the 32nd Merov Regiment without informing me?"
"Who granted you the authority to command the 32nd Merov Regiment without informing me?"
"Who granted you the authority to command the 32nd Merov Regiment without informing me?"

languages.text: «¿Quién le ha dado autoridad para liderar al 32.º regimiento de Merov sin informarme debidamente?».
languages.original_text: "Who granted you the authority to command the 32nd Merov Regiment without informing me?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Quién le ha dado autoridad para liderar al 32.º regimiento de Merov sin informarme debidamente?».

languages.text: “是谁给你的权力，居然在我不知情的情况下调动梅罗夫第32团？”
languages.original_text: "Who granted you the authority to command the 32nd Merov Regiment without informing me?"

traits.locale_text: “是谁给你的权力，居然在我不知情的情况下调动梅罗夫第32团？”

languages.text: « Qui vous a donné l'autorisation de commander au 32e régiment de Merov sans m'en informer ? »
languages.original_text: "Who granted you the authority to command the 32nd Merov Regiment without informing me?"

traits.locale_text: « Qui vous a donné l'autorisation de commander au 32e régiment de Merov sans m'en informer ? »

languages.text: "Bana haber vermeden 32. Merov Alayı'na komuta etme yetkisini sana kim verdi?"
languages.original_text: "Who granted you the authority to command the 32nd Merov Regiment without informing me?"

traits.locale_text: "Bana haber vermeden 32. Merov Alayı'na komuta etme yetkisini sana kim verdi?"

languages.text: 「32番目のメロフ連隊を指揮する権限を、私に知らせることなく、誰に与えられたのですか？」
languages.original_text: "Who granted you the authority to command the 32nd Merov Regiment without informing me?"

traits.locale_text: 「32番目のメロフ連隊を指揮する権限を、私に知らせることなく、誰に与えられたのですか？」

languages.text: "Wer hat Euch autorisiert, das 32. Merov-Regiment zu befehligen, ohne mich zu informieren?"
languages.original_text: "Who granted you the authority to command the 32nd Merov Regiment without informing me?"

traits.locale_text: "Wer hat Euch autorisiert, das 32. Merov-Regiment zu befehligen, ohne mich zu informieren?"
